title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Risk Reduction and Management Council (MDRRMC) resolution No. 2025-05 dated July 25, 2025, entitled "Resolution Allocating the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund CY 2025 - 30% Quick Response Fund amounting to Seven Million Seven Hundred Fifty-One Thousand Four Hundred Forty-Five pesos and 68/100 (Php 7,751,445.68) for various purposes and approving the same."
